title: Bitter Crunchy Jamaican Beef Brisket Bowl
description: A bold solo‑dinner bowl featuring seared beef brisket, bitter kale, a zingy lime‑soy sauce, and toasted coconut for crunch.

ingredients.name: whisked lime‑soy sauce
ingredients.amount: 1 tbsp lime juice, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp honey, 1 minced garlic clove, 1/8 tsp crushed scotch bonnet pepper

instructions: Whisk lime juice, soy sauce, honey, minced garlic, and crushed scotch bonnet pepper until smooth. Set aside.
Heat a skillet over medium‑high heat and add the olive oil.
Add the beef brisket slices and sear until browned on all sides, about 4–5 minutes.
Sprinkle allspice, thyme, salt, and pepper over the beef; stir and cook for 2 minutes to coat the meat.
Add the chopped kale to the skillet, stir, and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Pour the whisked lime‑soy sauce over the beef and kale, tossing to combine. Let simmer for 5 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl, top with toasted coconut flakes, and drizzle with any remaining sauce.
Garnish with chopped scallions and a squeeze of fresh lime if desired.
Serve hot and enjoy the bitter crunch and savory beef.
